projects.title: KasaYie
projects.description: Award-winning AI assistant that helps Akan-speaking individuals with speech impairments communicate in real time. Fine-tuned OpenAI Whisper on imperfect Akan speech and built the full mobile experience from audio capture to real-time response.
highlights: Fine-tuned OpenAI Whisper on slurred and stammering Akan speech
Full mobile UX from audio capture to real-time AI response
Hackathon winner — Tekyerema Pa 2025

projects.title: Wote
projects.description: Wote - AI-powered Ghana Sign Language learning & competitive gaming (Telegram bot + web frontend + ML pipeline) — built for UNICEF Startup Lab (3rd Place, Best AI Implementation).
highlights: Bidirectional GSL → English / Twi / Ewe translation
UNICEF AI for Inclusion Hackathon 2025
Making classrooms and public spaces accessible for deaf Ghanaians

projects.title: Trekr
projects.description: Open-source application tracker — like a personal CRM for your job search, scholarships, grants, and fellowships. Track every application, interview, contact, and follow-up in one place.
highlights: Multi-user with Google SSO via Clerk
Full-stack Next.js + PostgreSQL
Public open source under GPL-3.0 with contributor docs

projects.title: Emissor
projects.description: A scalable email marketing and automation platform — businesses manage campaigns, schedule sends, segment audiences, and track analytics. Built the backend API architecture, campaign scheduling logic, and multi-role admin dashboards.
highlights: Campaign management, scheduling, and audience segmentation
Multi-role admin dashboards
Designed the full backend API architecture

projects.title: OTConekt
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile tele-rehabilitation app connecting patients with licensed occupational therapists remotely — therapist profiles, appointment booking, real-time messaging, and video calls.
highlights: Therapist profiles with scheduling and credentials
Real-time messaging and video calls via WebRTC
Appointment booking with calendar integration

projects.title: J100 Coders
projects.description: Edtech platform teaching kids to code with interactive lessons, progress tracking, and instructor dashboards. Shipped to production with 200+ active students in the first term.
highlights: Multi-role interfaces for students, instructors, and admins
Real-time progress tracking
200+ active students in the first term

projects.title: PicMorph
projects.description: Web-based image conversion platform — transform images between multiple formats with zero quality loss. Batch processing, drag & drop, client-side privacy.
highlights: Support for JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, TIFF, BMP
Batch processing with drag & drop
Client-side processing for privacy

projects.title: Mechanic Workshop Management System
projects.description: Full management system for an automotive repair shop — customer management, vehicle tracking, service scheduling, invoicing, and analytics. Delivered for a client at Dzorwulu.
highlights: Job card & invoice generation with PDF export
Business analytics dashboard with revenue trends
REST API endpoints for data management

projects.title: Zest POS
projects.description: Point of Sale application helping small businesses in Africa thrive. Built the entire front end — component library, responsive interfaces, API integration, and performance optimisation.
highlights: Owned the full front-end architecture
Optimised for low-bandwidth connections in African markets

projects.title: City of Sellingstar School
projects.description: Full web platform with CMS for an early years school in Ghana — admin dashboard, appointment booking, gallery management, and responsive design.
highlights: Complete CMS with dynamic page & section management
Appointment booking & mail management

projects.title: Wellness Community Academy
projects.description: Wellness platform with courses, eBooks, and an affiliate management system — commission tracking, payout processing, and analytics. Integrated Paystack for mobile money & card payments.
highlights: Affiliate system with 15% direct & 2% indirect referral commission
Paystack integration for Mobile Money & card payments
Automated email notifications & appointment booking

projects.title: Yenko
projects.description: Real-time urban carpooling and mobility platform matching passengers with drivers on existing routes — cutting transport friction in congested West African cities. Built ride condition filtering, real-time route matching, and seamless mobile payments.
highlights: Real-time driver-passenger route matching
Ride condition filtering for safety and preference
Mobile payments integration

projects.title: MindLink
projects.description: Private, AI-assisted mental health system that helps users track their wellbeing, detect early risk patterns, and connect to the right support — accessible even without internet. Built at the Harvard Health Hackathon (HSIL) 2026.
highlights: AI-powered wellbeing tracking and early risk detection
Works offline — accessible without internet
Built at Harvard Health Science Innovation Lab Hackathon 2026

projects.title: Ashmore Venture POS
projects.description: Production-grade Point of Sale, inventory management, and staff management platform built for Ashmore Ventures — enabling SMEs to manage stock, control staff access, and generate receipts with role-based precision.
highlights: Inventory management with real-time stock tracking
Role-based access control (RBAC) for staff
Receipt generation and sales analytics
Reusable component library reducing UI regression across the team

projects.title: Inerca Insurance App
projects.description: Production mobile platform for a leading insurance company in Botswana — streamlining insurance operations and giving clients a seamless self-service experience from policy management to claims.
highlights: Client self-service for policy management and claims
Delivered for a leading insurer in Botswana
Streamlined insurance operations end-to-end

projects.title: Shelta
projects.description: Full-stack housing platform for Accra built for the UN-Habitat Quality of Life Hackathon. Connects tenants, landlords, and service providers — verified listings, digitized rent payments via MoMo & bank, QoL neighbourhood scoring, automated maintenance routing, and rent advance loans. PWA-powered for offline access.
highlights: QoL neighbourhood scoring by proximity to schools, hospitals, transit & markets
Verified landlords, tenants & service providers
MoMo + bank payment integration with digital rent receipts
Offline-capable PWA
